title: Item name without spaces
excerpt:

posts.author: dara_t (Dara Thomason)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way in this automation for me to create a new item with the same name prefix, but add additional text without a space?

I want: {Item name}_graphic
But am getting {itemname} _graphic
It will only let me input it with a space in between the item name and the _graphic

I would like for it to be one continuous string.

Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dara,

Thanks for raising this!

I’ve tested this on my end and it looks like this is expected behaviour with regard to the formatting via automation. I will relay this to our internal incase this can be considered for future improvements - thank you for your understanding
